repos.rationale: Primary target for all three deliverables: README.md, GitHub Actions publish workflow, and artifact retrieval commands. Also needs version string fix (src/index.ts line 47 hardcodes 0.1.0 vs package.json 1.2.0) and prepublishOnly script addition. New src/artifacts/ command module follows established patterns from src/comments/ and src/inspect/.

CORRECTION: Direct reading of src/routes/api.ts lines 236-240 confirms artifact endpoints (lines 237-238) are ALREADY registered before requireAuth (line 240) with attachInspectionAuth + requireCommentAuth middleware. No server-side route changes are needed. The prior diagnosis claim that routes need to be moved was based on outdated line numbers. helix-global-server is context for understanding the artifact API shape that the CLI will consume.
